title: LegacyOG
description: This mod is remaking all the features from Minecraft Legacy Edition for old minecraft version (like 1.0)
body:
# Legacy OG – Relive the Classic Console Minecraft Experience on older version

Step back in time and experience the nostalgic charm of the original Minecraft Console Edition with Legacy OG. This mod faithfully recreates the look, feel, and atmosphere of Minecraft as it appeared on consoles back in version 1.0, bringing classic textures, GUI, and iconic features to modern PC gameplay.

## **Features:**

1. Authentic console-style menus and interface.
   
1. Classic textures and font styles reminiscent of Minecraft Xbox Edition.
   
1. Legacy splash screens and intro animations to relive the original console vibe.
   
1. Compatible with Minecraft 1.0, bringing old-school charm to the modern game.
   
(This mod is highly based on Legacy4J by Wilyicaro)
